assignments.name: content
assignments.value:
AppCraft Studios — Company Knowledge Base

This document contains our official FAQs, pricing, and policies. Alex (our AI support agent) should always answer customer questions using the information below, not generic or made-up answers.

ABOUT US
AppCraft Studios is a software house specializing in Android and iOS mobile app development. We have been building mobile apps for startups and small businesses since 2019. Our team includes developers, UI/UX designers, and QA testers.

SERVICES WE OFFER
- Android App Development — Native Android apps built with Kotlin.
- iOS App Development — Native iOS apps built with Swift.
- Cross-Platform Development — Flutter-based apps that run on both Android and iOS from a single codebase (faster and cheaper than building both natively).
- UI/UX Design — Wireframes, prototypes, and full visual design for mobile apps.
- App Maintenance & Updates — Bug fixes, OS compatibility updates, and feature additions for apps already in production.
- App Store & Google Play Publishing — We handle the full submission process, including store listing optimization, screenshots, and compliance review.

PRICING
Simple app (single platform, basic features): $1,500 – $3,000, Timeline 3–5 weeks
Medium complexity app (login, database, API integration): $3,000 – $7,000, Timeline 5–9 weeks
Complex app (real-time features, payments, custom backend): $7,000 – $15,000+, Timeline 9–16 weeks
Cross-platform (Flutter, both Android + iOS): +20% over single-platform price
UI/UX Design only (no development): $500 – $2,000, Timeline 1–3 weeks
Monthly App Maintenance Retainer: $150 – $500/month, Ongoing

Payment terms: We require 40% upfront, 30% at the midpoint milestone, and 30% upon final delivery.
Note: These are estimate ranges. Every project gets a custom quote within 24 hours after we understand the app idea, platform, and required features.

OUR PROCESS
1. Discovery Call — We discuss your app idea, target users, and must-have features.
2. Proposal & Quote — We send a written proposal with timeline and pricing within 24 hours.
3. Design Phase — Wireframes and UI mockups for your approval.
4. Development Phase — Build in 2-week sprints, with progress demos.
5. Testing & QA — Bug fixing and performance testing before launch.
6. Launch — App Store / Google Play submission and publishing.
7. Post-Launch Support — Optional maintenance retainer for ongoing updates.

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

Q: How long does it take to build an app?
A: Simple apps take 3–5 weeks. More complex apps with custom backends or real-time features can take 9–16 weeks. Exact timeline depends on features and platform.

Q: Do you build for both Android and iOS?
A: Yes. We can build native apps separately for each platform, or a single cross-platform app using Flutter that runs on both — which is usually faster and more cost-effective.

Q: Can you just design the app without building it?
A: Yes, we offer UI/UX design as a standalone service starting at $500.

Q: Do you help publish the app on the App Store / Google Play?
A: Yes, publishing and store listing setup is included in our full development packages.

Q: What if I already have an app and just need updates or bug fixes?
A: We offer app maintenance services starting at $150/month, or one-time fixes quoted based on the issue.

Q: Do you sign NDAs?
A: Yes, we're happy to sign a Non-Disclosure Agreement before discussing your app idea in detail.

Q: What technologies do you use?
A: Kotlin for native Android, Swift for native iOS, and Flutter for cross-platform apps. Backend work typically uses Node.js or Firebase depending on project needs.

Q: Can you work with a fixed budget?
A: Yes, let us know your budget and must-have features, and we'll scope a version of the app that fits.

Q: Do you offer refunds?
A: We don't offer refunds on completed milestones, but if a project is cancelled before a milestone is finished, you only pay for the work completed up to that point.

ESCALATION POLICY
- Complaints or urgent bugs in a live app are escalated to the technical team within 2 hours.
- Hot leads (clients with a clear budget, urgency, and buying intent) are routed directly to the owner for a same-day response.
- General inquiries unrelated to app development are politely redirected back to our core services.
